name: Springans Brothers
name_jp: スプリガンズ・ブラザーズ
desc: If this card is sent from the hand or Deck to the GY: You can target 1 "Springans" monster in your GY, except "Springans Brothers"; Special Summon it in Defense Position. If this card is in your hand, field, or GY: You can target 1 "Springans" Xyz Monster you control; attach this card to it as material. You can only use each effect of "Springans Brothers" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If this card is sent from the hand or Deck to the GY: You can target 1 "Springans" monster in your GY, except "Springans Brothers"; Special Summon it in Defense Position. If this card is in your hand, field, or GY: You can target 1 "Springans" Xyz Monster you control; attach this card to it as material. You can only use each effect of "Springans Brothers" once per turn.
eff: If this card is sent from the hand or Deck to the GY: You can target 1 "Springans" monster in your GY, except "Springans Brothers"; Special Summon it in Defense Position. If this card is in your hand, field, or GY: You can target 1 "Springans" Xyz Monster you control; attach this card to it as material. You can only use each effect of "Springans Brothers" once per turn.

action: Attaches itself from your hand as Xyz Material
Attaches itself from your field as Xyz Material
Attaches itself from your Graveyard as Xyz Material
misc: Requires control of specific Monster card type
